Headline: News - Primary School Rolls Inquiry (State), England
Info: The House of Lords Public Services Committee has launched a national inquiry into the causes and impacts of falling primary school rolls across England, examining how demographic shifts are affecting school financial sufficiency.

Headline: Merger - St Mary's Prep School and Rupert House, Henley
Info: St Mary's Prep School is set to close at the end of the summer term after 100 years and merge with Rupert House due to declining pupil numbers, rising energy costs, and the introduction of VAT on fees.

Headline: Closure - Little Marlow CE School (State), Buckinghamshire
Info: Buckinghamshire Council has approved the permanent closure of Little Marlow CE School following a request from its governing body, driven by a severe lack of pupil numbers in younger year groups.

Headline: Financial - Stretford Primary School (State), Manchester
Info: A primary school in Stretford is facing the threat of closure due to severe financial pressures, with local reports indicating that the school's debts could run into hundreds of thousands of pounds.

Headline: Closure Update - St Joseph's College, Reading
Info: St Joseph's College has confirmed a closure date of 10 July 2026 if no financial rescue is found, prompting nearby independent The Abbey School to officially offer places to displaced families.

Headline: Closure - St Joseph's College, Reading
Info: St Joseph's College has entered a formal consultation period regarding its potential permanent closure in July 2026, citing falling pupil numbers and increasing costs exacerbated by the introduction of VAT on independent school fees.
